title: Insert a given node in BST

content.problemStatement: Write a program for the coding challenge "Insert a given node in BST". Refer to LeetCode description: https://leetcode.com/problems/insert-into-a-binary-search-tree/
content.inputFormat: The input will be the root of the binary search tree and the value to be inserted.
content.outputFormat: The output will be the root of the modified binary search tree.

solution.approach: Recursive or Iterative approach to insert a node in the binary search tree while maintaining the BST property.
solution.timeComplexity: O(h) where h is the height of the tree
solution.spaceComplexity: O(h) for recursive approach and O(1) for iterative approach
